text: All this mulch rings are even cut out.
What we do is after we cut them out,
have one guy go through and rake it in a pile,
and another guy follow and shovel it up.
Now you can tell it makes a mess all the way around the trunk,
so once you're done shoveling it out,
you've got to go with your blower and your ear protection,
go around, blow the mess back into the tree,
and then you'll preen it and you'll mulch it.
Now let's look at this tree.
This is an example of one that's been cut out.
It hasn't been blown quite yet,
but we're going to show you how we're going to mulch them anyway.
We're going to preen it and go ahead and mulch it.
Notice we've got a nice deep lip here,
so when you mulch it, this is what you want to have everybody see.
When they drive in, that's what they're going to notice.
So we're going to preen it.
